A.text: The top and middle balls remain connected, but the bottom ball separates.

B.text: All three balls remain attached as a single piece.

C.text: All three balls detach and fall off as separate pieces.

D.text: The bottom and middle balls remain connected, but the top ball separates.

parsed.answer_value: All three balls remain attached as a single piece.
parsed.rationale: The cut through the curved tube does not disconnect the entire structure because the tubes are interconnected in a way that maintains the overall connectivity of the balls. The Seifert surface is designed such that a single cut does not separate the entire structure into distinct pieces.
